---
title: "🗓️ Unit 6 - Preparation for Examen No. 1"
---

In this week, we will review key concepts and equations for the Exam No. 1.


## 👨‍🏫 Lecture Slides 

Click [here](slides.qmd) to view the slides.

🎥 

## ✍️ Coursework

🏫
Complete the exercises for  your *Informe No. 1* (It is due on 25.03.2026)
🏫
